title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Shroff Eye Centre

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Shroff Eye Centre
jsonLd.description:
Shroff Eye Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shroff Eye Centre:
Shroff Eye Centre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre!
